_comment: Front backplane (PERC RAID + PERC-flashed sas2ircu), addressed as enc:slot. Dell 12G on LSI IT mode reports a clean mirror-reversal across 8 bays -> reverse_slots. For an arbitrary permutation instead, drop reverse_slots and use 'map': {"32:0": "32:7", ...}. Calibrate with: b2ctl locate <serial>

Back PCIe SSD enclosure(s) (NVMe). Relabel each drive's PCIe address to a custom bay, e.g. map: [ {"bdf": "d8:00.0", "bay": "PCIe2:0"}, {"bdf": "d9:00.0", "bay": "PCIe2:1"} ]. A drive's bdf shows as its BAY in `b2ctl status`, or: cat /sys/class/nvme/nvme0/address . One or more back panels are allowed.
